newsMedia.subtitle: Brand updates, project milestones, industry features, and editorial coverage in one place.

items.title: WallBolt Atelier expands premium residential delivery across NCR and Bengaluru
items.excerpt: The next phase of expansion focuses on tighter design-build coordination, stronger site reporting, and premium finish packages for growing urban demand.

items.title: Courtyard Villa handover highlights the brand's facade-to-interior continuity
items.excerpt: From facade detailing to indoor material warmth, the completed villa demonstrates how the studio connects architecture and interior tone into one story.

items.title: Design leadership shares how premium homes stay refined without becoming visually noisy
items.excerpt: The team's current point of view emphasizes restraint, material repetition, and proportion over trend-led styling that dates too quickly.

items.title: Construction planning workshop outlines smarter budgeting before design lock-in
items.excerpt: The session focused on helping homeowners understand package fit, engineering realities, and finish decisions before committing to expensive late changes.
